__listDescriptions.Necromantic Magic: Necromancy is the magic of the dead. It grants Necromancers the power to raise the dead and command spirits, but also to destroy the vitality of the living.
__listDescriptions.Prayers of Sigmar: Those with great faith in the gods can call upon their divine power. The priests of Sigmar can pray for many miracles: healing of wounds, strengthening the resolve of their comrades or the banishment of Daemonic creatures and the Undead.
__listDescriptions.Waaaagh! Magic: Waaagh! spells are used by Orc Shamans. They are rituals of a sort, howling prayers to the boisterous Orc gods Gork and Mork.
__listDescriptions.Magic of the Horned Rat: This brand of sorcery is used by the Skaven. It is a sinister form of magic which calls upon the Skaven deity, a loathsome daemonic god known as the Horned Rat.
__listDescriptions.Chaos Rituals: Chaos rituals employ the raw power of the darkest magic, and are therefore supremely useful in bringing pain and suffering, as well as change and mutation.
__listDescriptions.Prayers of Taal: Taal is the God of Nature and demands the respect of all those who enter the wild regions of the Empire.

Necromantic Magic.name: Lifestealer
Necromantic Magic.description: Choose a single model within 6". The target suffers a wound (no save allowed) and the Necromancer gains an extra wound for the duration of the battle (may exceed maximum).

Necromantic Magic.name: Re-Animation
Necromantic Magic.description: One Zombie that went out of action last phase returns within 6" of Necromancer (not in base contact).

Necromantic Magic.name: Death Vision
Necromantic Magic.description: Necromancer causes Fear for the duration of the battle.

Necromantic Magic.name: Spell of Doom
Necromantic Magic.description: Choose model within 12". Target must roll equal to or less than Strength or suffer an Injury roll.

Necromantic Magic.name: Call of Vanhel
Necromantic Magic.description: Single Zombie or Dire Wolf within 6" may move again (can charge).

Necromantic Magic.name: Spell of Awakening
Necromantic Magic.description: If an enemy Hero is killed, raise him as a Zombie. Retains stats/weapons/armor but no equipment/skills. Cannot run.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: The Hammer of Sigmar
Prayers of Sigmar.description: Wielder gains +2 Strength and causes double damage. Test each shooting phase to use.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Hearts of Steel
Prayers of Sigmar.description: Allies within 8" are immune to Fear/All Alone. Warband gets +1 to Rout tests. Lasts until caster is down/stunned/OOA.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Soulfire
Prayers of Sigmar.description: Enemies within 4" suffer S3 hit (no save). Undead/Possessed suffer S5 hit.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Shield of Faith
Prayers of Sigmar.description: Priest is immune to spells. Roll 1-2 in recovery to see if it disappears.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Healing Hand
Prayers of Sigmar.description: One model within 2" is restored to full wounds. Stunned/Knocked down models within 2" stand up.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Armour of Righteousness
Prayers of Sigmar.description: Priest gets 2+ armor save and causes Fear. Lasts until next shooting phase.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Led'z go
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Orcs/Goblins within 4" strike first. Lasts until caster is down/stunned/OOA.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Oi! Gerroff!
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Range 8". Pushes enemy D6" away. Collision causes S3 hit.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Zzap!
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Range 12". D3 S4 hits on closest enemy, no save.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Fooled Ya!
Waaaagh! Magic.description: No enemy may charge Shaman next turn. If in combat, move 4" away.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Clubba
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Counts as club with +2 Strength and +1 Attack. Lasts until Shaman suffers a wound.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Fire of Gork
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Range 12". Two bolts causing D3 S3 hits each.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Warpfire
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: Range 8". D3 S4 hits on target, S3 hit on models within 2".

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Children of the Horned Rat
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: Before game, once per battle. Summons D3 Giant Rats within 6". Disappear after battle.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Gnawdoom
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: Range 8". 2D6 S1 hits on single model.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Black Fury
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: Charge enemy within 12" (ignore terrain/models). Gain +2 Attacks and +1 Strength for this turn.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Eye of the Warp
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: Models in base contact must pass Leadership test or suffer S3 hit and run 2D6" away.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Sorcerer's Curse
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: Range 12". Target must re-roll successful armour saves and to hit rolls for the next phase.

Chaos Rituals.name: Vision of Torment
Chaos Rituals.description: Range 6". Closest enemy is stunned (or knocked down if immune).

Chaos Rituals.name: Eye of God
Chaos Rituals.description: Once per battle. Roll D6 for model within 6": 1: OOA ; 2-5: +1 to one stat ; 6: +1 to all stats.

Chaos Rituals.name: Dark Blood
Chaos Rituals.description: Range 8". D3 S5 hits. Caster must roll on Injury table (OOA counts as stunned).

Chaos Rituals.name: Lure of Chaos
Chaos Rituals.description: Range 12". Compare Ld + D6. If caster wins, gain control of model until it passes Ld test in recovery.

Chaos Rituals.name: Wings of Darkness
Chaos Rituals.description: Move anywhere within 12" (counts as charging if engaging).

Chaos Rituals.name: Word of Pain
Chaos Rituals.description: All models within 3" suffer S3 hit (no armour saves).

Prayers of Taal.name: Stag’s Leap
Prayers of Taal.description: Move anywhere within 9" (counts as charging if engaging). +1 Strength on first round.

Prayers of Taal.name: Blessed Ale
Prayers of Taal.description: Heal model within 2". Nearby living enemies lose 1 Attack.

Prayers of Taal.name: Bear's Paw
Prayers of Taal.description: Target within 6" gains +2 Strength until Priest's next turn.

Prayers of Taal.name: Earthshudder
Prayers of Taal.description: Building within 4" collapses. Models on/touching it suffer hits.

Prayers of Taal.name: Tanglefoot
Prayers of Taal.description: 1/2 speed for all within 12" (except Jaeger/Horned Hunters).

Prayers of Taal.name: Summon Squirrels
Prayers of Taal.description: Target within 12" suffers 2D6 S1 hits (no armour saves).
